Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Initial MVP - Event-Triggered Campaign Advisor

Complete 3-tier architecture implementation for event discovery and campaign recommendations:

## Architecture
- MCP Server: Event discovery tools \(Ticketmaster API\)
- Agent Backend: Claude-powered orchestration with tool-calling
- Frontend: React chat interface

## Features Implemented
✅ MCP server with 3 tools:
  - search_events: Ticketmaster API integration with response shaping & caching
  - get_event_details: Detailed event information retrieval
  - recommend_campaign_window: Deterministic scoring algorithm with explainable rationale

✅ Agent backend:
  - Anthropic SDK integration with Claude 3.5 Sonnet
  - MCP client spawning server as child process
  - Tool-calling loop with conversation history
  - Express API with /chat, /reset, /health endpoints

✅ Frontend:
  - Vite + React + TypeScript
  - Chat interface with real-time messaging
  - Error handling and loading states
  - Responsive gradient UI

## Security
- API keys in .env files \(gitignored\)
- .env.example files for setup
- No secrets in frontend build

## Testing
- Standalone MCP server test script
- CLI agent test interface
- End-to-end integration verified

Built for InMarket AI Builder Challenge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
